# Package index

## All functions

- [`parse_edgestring()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/edge_parsing.md)
  [`parse_edges()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/edge_parsing.md)
  : Parse edges in a graph specification
- [`get_numids()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/get_numids.md)
  : Retrieves numeric IDs given alphanumeric IDs
- [`qd_set_node_attrs()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  [`qd_set_edge_attrs()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  [`select_nodes_by_alpha_id()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  [`qd_select_nodes()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  [`select_edges_by_node_alpha_id()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  [`qd_select_edges()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/graph_operations.md)
  : Graph operations
- [`parse_nodes()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/node_parsing.md)
  : Parse nodes
- [`qd_adjustment_sets()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_adjustment_sets.md)
  [`qd_todagitty()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_adjustment_sets.md)
  : Identify variables for adjustment
- [`qd_dag()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_dag.md) :
  Generate a graph object
- [`qd_save()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_save.md)
  : Save graph objects as images
- [`qd_swig()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_swig.md)
  : Generate a single-world intervention graph (SWIG)
- [`qd_themes()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  [`theme_qd_base()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  [`theme_qd_circles()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  [`theme_qd_pearl()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  [`get_conditioned_nodes()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  [`cleanup_existing_theme()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/qd_themes.md)
  : Diagram themes
- [`sep_opts()`](https://jrgant.github.io/quickdag/reference/sep_opts.md)
  : View options for fixed node separator characters
